text.title: Terraform Project Structure and GitHub Actions CI/CD for AWS Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: configure-backend
step.action: Provision S3 bucket + DDB lock table; write backend.tf per env.

step.name: configure-provider
step.action: Author providers.tf with default_tags + version pin.

step.name: extract-modules
step.action: Move shared resources into infrastructure/modules/; envs call them.

step.name: compose-workflow
step.action: Author tf-ci.yml with plan on PR + sequential apply per env.

step.name: configure-branch-protection
step.action: Make plan + apply required checks; mark prod env as requiring 1+ approvers.
